global.description: The ad features a minimalist design with layered shapes and prominent text elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to track their spending with a fast signup process.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A gray circular shape overlapping a rectangular shape, creating a layered effect.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A similar gray circular shape overlapping another rectangular shape, maintaining a consistent design.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A larger gray rectangular shape that serves as a backdrop for the text elements.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Track every euro' with a smaller tagline 'Fast signup, instant card' beneath it.
elements.text_content: Track every euro Fast signup, instant card

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: A simple logo with the text 'CoinBridge' displayed prominently at the top.

elements.label: Call to action text
elements.description: A clear white button text saying 'Watch now' positioned at the bottom of the ad.
